name: Desert Merc — Holy Freeze
flavor: A Lut Gholein spear-bearer whose every step crystallises the air. The cold of his aura slows the wicked into easy prey.

name: Desert Merc — Might
flavor: His war chant lends strength to the entire warband; even a peasant's club bites like a falcata at his side.

name: Iron Wolf — Fire
flavor: An Iron Wolf of Kurast who has bound the spirit of flame to his blade. He laughs at jungle rain — it boils before it lands.

name: Barbarian — Battle Orders
flavor: A Bul-Kathos veteran whose roar inflates the lungs and the courage of every soul within earshot.

name: Rogue Scout — Pierce
flavor: A Sister of the Sightless Eye whose arrows stitch through three foes before burying themselves in the fourth.

name: Desert Merc — Thorns
flavor: Strike him and reap your own ribs — his armour bleeds the careless attacker.

name: Desert Merc — Prayer
flavor: He whispers Zakarum litanies between thrusts; wounds close on those near him as if Akarat himself watched.

name: Iron Wolf — Cold
flavor: His glacial spikes leave the swamps of Kurast white with frost long after the battle is done.

name: Iron Wolf — Lightning
flavor: Five errant bolts dance from his fingertips — sometimes they all find the same throat.

name: Rogue Scout — Fire Arrow
flavor: She dips each shaft in pitch and breath — a single shot lights a whole nest of fallen on fire.

name: Rogue Scout — Cold Arrow
flavor: Each arrowhead is hollowed and packed with rime-salt; what it does not kill, it sluggishly preserves for the next volley.

name: Barbarian — War Cry
flavor: His shout has felled a charging beast at twenty paces. Lesser foes simply forget how to stand.

name: Paladin — Holy Fire
flavor: A Pandemonium pilgrim wreathed in sanctified flame — the demons cower not from heat, but from judgement.

name: Rogue Scout — Trainee
flavor: Fresh from the Monastery's archery yard, her draw is steady even if her count of demons is still zero.

name: Rogue Scout — Inner Sight
flavor: She paints the foe in moonlight only her allies can see — every gap in their armour suddenly becomes a target.

name: Desert Merc — Blessed Aim
flavor: Even the wildest spear-thrust seems to find a vital organ when this man is at your side.

name: Desert Merc — Defiance
flavor: He plants his spear and the desert wind itself seems to refuse to blow against you.

name: Iron Wolf — Frozen Armor
flavor: A Iron Wolf novice wrapped in a shimmering glacis — the last thing many a melee attacker ever embraces.

name: Iron Wolf — Telekinesis
flavor: He never touches the foe — and the foe rarely touches the ground.

name: Militia — Pikeman
flavor: A Kurast docks volunteer with a sharpened mop handle and remarkable resolve.

name: Militia — Swordsman
flavor: Two months of swordplay lessons from a retired Iron Wolf — not nothing, not much.

name: Thief — Pickpocket
flavor: She insists she's only here for the gold — but the demons drop the most interesting purses.

name: Acolyte Priestess
flavor: An apprentice of the Zakarum, still nervous of blood, but her healing hymn never falters.

name: Barbarian Recruit
flavor: Fresh down from Arreat, eager to prove that his clan markings are not just decoration.

name: Paladin Initiate
flavor: A Pandemonium novice whose shield bash carries more conviction than skill — for now.
